creator: freebsd@zilon.de
text:
The Send_Email option of the devel/git port depends on the deprecated mail/p5-Net-SMTP-SSL port. The latter will be removed at the end of march from the port system.


Installing p5-Net-SMTP-SSL-1.04...
===>   NOTICE:

This port is deprecated; you may wish to reconsider installing it:

Deprecated by upstream, use Net::SMTP instead.

It is scheduled to be removed on or after 2017-03-31.
